form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on March 9 at Gawler over 400m. Last start was second over 342m in 19.63, behind Stormy Day. Has good speed and will give a sight from the rails.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (19.76) over 342m at this track. Has a low draw. Worth including.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a neck second (19.73) over 342m at this track. Holds top-three claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked along back straight; Checked turn off back straight.
Checked and dragged down turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 342m at this track in a handy (19.71), beating Elegant Cindy. Will find this a bit tougher, good win recently but others preferred.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.98) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Has four wins and four placings from 14 starts from the draw. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on March 30 over 342m at this track behind Stormy Day, beaten 4 lengths (19.87) in a Grade 5. Prefer to watch at this stage.
